name: Dezeen — Architecture
note: Disabled — Dezeen is behind Cloudflare bot protection that 403s even real browser UAs. Needs a headless browser to scrape.

name: ArchDaily
note: Large global architecture archive. Article URLs have a numeric id + slug.
